zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Wolcott於大約1570年出生在英國薩默塞特阿可布利其時，他的父親John Wolcott26歲，母親Mrs John Wolcott27歲。他於1598年2月13日與Mary Phippen在英國薩默塞特阿可布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國薩默塞特阿可布利其被列為mercer and mayor。他去世於大約1640年在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特阿可布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Wolcott于大约1570年出生在英国薩默塞特阿可布利其时，他的父亲John Wolcott26岁，母亲Mrs John Wolcott27岁。他于1598年2月13日与Mary Phippen在英国薩默塞特阿可布利其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国薩默塞特阿可布利其被列为mercer and mayor。他去世于大约1640年在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特阿可布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Wolcott was born about 1570, in Axbridge, Somerset, England, his father, John Wolcott, was 26 and his mother, Mrs John Wolcott, was 27. He married Mary Phippen on 13 February 1598, in Axbridge, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as mercer and mayor in Axbridge, Somerset, England. He died about 1640, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in Axbridge, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Wolcott est né environ 1570, à Axbridge, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Wolcott, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Wolcott, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Phippen le 13 février 1598, à Axbridge, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est mercer and mayor à Axbridge, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1640, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Axbridge, Somerset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Wolcottが約1570年にイギリスソメルセトアクスブリッジで生まれた時，父John Wolcottは26歳，母Mrs John Wolcottは27歳であった。1598年2月13日にイギリスソメルセトアクスブリッジでMary Phippenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスソメルセトアクスブリッジでの職業はmercer and mayorと記録されている。彼は約1640年に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトアクスブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Cuthbert's, Wells, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스 웰스 스트 c스버트

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Wolcott(이)가 대략 1570년 영국 서머세트 액브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wolcott(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Wolcott(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1598년 2월 13일 영국 서머세트 액브리지에서 Mary Phippen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 액브리지에서 mercer and mayor이었다. 그는 대략 1640년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 액브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Wolcott nasceu aproximadamente 1570, em Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wolcott, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Wolcott, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Phippen em 13 de fevereiro de 1598, em Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como mercer and mayor em Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1640, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Wolcott родился около 1570 г. в местности аксбридж, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wolcott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Wolcott, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Phippen 13 февраля 1598 г. в местности аксбридж, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии mercer and mayor в местности аксбридж, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер около 1640 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности аксбридж, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Mary Phippen el 13 de febrero de 1598, en Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era mercer and mayor en Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1640, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Axbridge, Somerset, Inglaterra.
